name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Another witch hunt. This time I’m the target
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JMNmvZHJiw_lSubQVNjZcBQCDDaloAiBZCN4iGYvSqv1yYQEwstHuc9cl2NNHa29GoIpJI03YXUuHzZKsavh0YmNqiGlzpRseXCYXlQ0tNEWCM84oF5cLHm1z0mteT3QpbWhEyJWr0PW2fFWkBsiBrG-G9wCos8IWc4-qJ3a1hQCC-0L6QtyJGUjOEhwdznR&c=0kjn-82IHECJCs0xkXwMKEzAcdJ-8GLO5h_BmTbwOZn-WAj4gr6MWw==&ch=BjU6qywNiXwOuyXTrVW9NUERwpI-ikkMN6MlPWAE1EXbBOcNeANE4A==)
---
| Peter,
Here we go again...just another media hoax. Do you remember the fake Russia Hoax? Their attempt to frame General Flynn? I do... and now they are coming for me.
They have smeared my name while creating another partisan witch hunt, all because I dared to stand up to them.
Even President Trump is fighting back:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JMNmvZHJiw_lSubQVNjZcBQCDDaloAiBZCN4iGYvSqv1yYQEwstHuc9cl2NNHa29GoIpJI03YXUuHzZKsavh0YmNqiGlzpRseXCYXlQ0tNEWCM84oF5cLHm1z0mteT3QpbWhEyJWr0PW2fFWkBsiBrG-G9wCos8IWc4-qJ3a1hQCC-0L6QtyJGUjOEhwdznR&c=0kjn-82IHECJCs0xkXwMKEzAcdJ-8GLO5h_BmTbwOZn-WAj4gr6MWw==&ch=BjU6qywNiXwOuyXTrVW9NUERwpI-ikkMN6MlPWAE1EXbBOcNeANE4A==)
---
| | | [JOIN TRUMP & FIGHT BACK](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JMNmvZHJiw_lSubQVNjZcBQCDDaloAiBZCN4iGYvSqv1yYQEwstHuV0eXp5e9zQMl8Q9CWZL7-UzBimwBuJqKueWEr9Uig5yKrI-YEJOfAZl0kNoDNNCb1DBuR9vW7ckLM1Jes0i-fvYbH_1H4BxsY4P9cr8TxzfcIxnP0ruZcVdnDpOO9nBNQ==&c=0kjn-82IHECJCs0xkXwMKEzAcdJ-8GLO5h_BmTbwOZn-WAj4gr6MWw==&ch=BjU6qywNiXwOuyXTrVW9NUERwpI-ikkMN6MlPWAE1EXbBOcNeANE4A==)
---
| I will not back down from the Fake News hacks that want to destroy me and America-First patriots like you. I am more determined than ever to shut down this HOAX, and [I am glad to have President Trump on my side.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JMNmvZHJiw_lSubQVNjZcBQCDDaloAiBZCN4iGYvSqv1yYQEwstHuc9cl2NNHa29GoIpJI03YXUuHzZKsavh0YmNqiGlzpRseXCYXlQ0tNEWCM84oF5cLHm1z0mteT3QpbWhEyJWr0PW2fFWkBsiBrG-G9wCos8IWc4-qJ3a1hQCC-0L6QtyJGUjOEhwdznR&c=0kjn-82IHECJCs0xkXwMKEzAcdJ-8GLO5h_BmTbwOZn-WAj4gr6MWw==&ch=BjU6qywNiXwOuyXTrVW9NUERwpI-ikkMN6MlPWAE1EXbBOcNeANE4A==)[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JMNmvZHJiw_lSubQVNjZcBQCDDaloAiBZCN4iGYvSqv1yYQEwstHuc9cl2NNHa29GoIpJI03YXUuHzZKsavh0YmNqiGlzpRseXCYXlQ0tNEWCM84oF5cLHm1z0mteT3QpbWhEyJWr0PW2fFWkBsiBrG-G9wCos8IWc4-qJ3a1hQCC-0L6QtyJGUjOEhwdznR&c=0kjn-82IHECJCs0xkXwMKEzAcdJ-8GLO5h_BmTbwOZn-WAj4gr6MWw==&ch=BjU6qywNiXwOuyXTrVW9NUERwpI-ikkMN6MlPWAE1EXbBOcNeANE4A==)
The D.C. Swamp protects its own, and their media puppets are going all-out with fake, salacious stories to try to take me down. These are the actions of a corrupt Establishment that is seeking to take out Trump supporters...BUT I WON'T BACK DOWN.
You can help President Trump and me fight back against the fake news media RIGHT NOW!

| Your support will help us stand our ground against the false narratives from the mainstream media.
The media's strategy is to repeat a hoax enough times to brainwash the American people, while covering up for real stories like Andrew Cuomo slaughtering thousands of seniors in nursing homes, the invasion at the southern border, and Hunter Biden's pay-for-play scheme in Ukraine.
Just look at CNN's recent headline:

Don't believe their lies or let them brainwash the American people. They hate me and they hate you because we stand for America First policies and are a threat to their empire of propaganda.

Peter --
We are excited to release our newest ad in support of the Biden Administration's BOLD effort to pass the American Jobs Plan that will put hundreds of thousands of people to work, modernize our roads, bridges and airports, connect our country to high speed airport and build a clean energy grid - all while using American workers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc-bold# [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc-bold#]We are thrilled to share this ad to Americans across Pennsylvania and Wisconsin after sharing our first ad of 2021, which promoted the HUGE success of the American Relief Plan.
We can't let up. It's critical for us to do this work so Joe Biden's support stays above 50% in these critical states.
Will you help us get this message out? We need as many voters across this country to know that President Biden and Vice President Harris are doing everything they can to reopen our economy and put people back to work.
Watch & Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc-bold#]Thank you for all you do.
Julianna

name: Senior Staff, Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: An alarming pattern in VA politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Help Democrats defy the odds in November.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27555241/280442980/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZWZjYi05ODliLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=autu0RsJT22_7Ig2MmaTL3nuR5Tq8e7UVdecdg5_keI=&emci=55dd181b-6799-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4621efcb-989b-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

There is an alarming pattern in Virginia politics: **_The party that wins the presidential election tends to lose the governor’s race the following year._**

If we want to defy this trend, we need to start preparing **now**. With elections for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and the entire House of Delegates coming up this November, we need the help of reliable supporters like _you_ to keep Virginia blue.

We know that you want Democrats to win across the Commonwealth, so we have an important question for you: **_[Will you make a recurring donation today to support Mark’s efforts to keep Virginia blue? We’ll even send you a free bumper sticker to say _thanks!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27555242/280442981/1853411285?refcode=20210409_e_f_us_na_na_recurnd__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZWZjYi05ODliLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=autu0RsJT22_7Ig2MmaTL3nuR5Tq8e7UVdecdg5_keI=)_** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27555243/280442982/1853411285?refcode=20210409_e_f_us_na_na_recurnd__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZWZjYi05ODliLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=autu0RsJT22_7Ig2MmaTL3nuR5Tq8e7UVdecdg5_keI=)
---
Mark Warner is committed to investing in races up and down the ballot this year. Just like he did in 2017 and 2019, when the blue wave brought change to Richmond, Mark is going to be hitting the road to make sure we defy the odds and elect Virginia Democrats at every level of state government.

**_[If you want to continue the progress Virginia Democrats have made on voting rights, education, racial justice, and rebuilding our economy, please consider becoming a recurring donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27555244/280442983/1853411285?refcode=20210409_e_f_us_na_na_recurnd__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZWZjYi05ODliLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=autu0RsJT22_7Ig2MmaTL3nuR5Tq8e7UVdecdg5_keI=)_ Your contributions will help Mark support Democrats at _every level_ across the Commonwealth.** **You’ll even receive a free bumper sticker so you can proudly show your support for Virginia Democrats!**

Thanks,
Senior Staff, Mark Warner for Virginia

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27555245/280442984/1853411285?refcode=20210409_e_f_us_na_na_recurnd__&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZWZjYi05ODliLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=autu0RsJT22_7Ig2MmaTL3nuR5Tq8e7UVdecdg5_keI=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of April 12th: Fight to protect the filibuster!
body:
| |
---
This week, we are recruiting more hosts for _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ house parties, and more. Be sure to check out what some patriots are up to in California, in what could be a blueprint for you!
_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Protect the Filibuster**
Host a _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ House Party
We are asking for volunteers to host house parties to watch _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ with friends and neighbors any time between April 22 – April 25. After the movie, there will be a discussion, action items, and then homework for later. This is a fun and easy way to educate people about the importance of the filibuster, and make sure they take some sort of action, rather than just talking about it.
**ADDITIONAL NOTES**
_If you are not able to host a house party because of COVID or health reasons, please commit to watching the film with your family and taking the actions afterward. _

_The filibuster is on the frontline defending our republic. We are working to make learning about it more engaging so we can take action to protect the filibuster. Even if you cannot host a house party, watching and taking action between April 22 - 25 will help us melt the phone lines and have a greater impact._

_Also, if you can’t hold your house party between those dates, feel free to schedule it for a date that works for you, or if you can’t hold it at your house, but you know someone who could, please go ahead and ask them to host!_
[HOST A HOUSE PARTY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdGZpbGlidXN0ZXIvP21pZD00MzYyOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=MpFfqZfqHcF4OWZ_SMtw-w)
Once you sign up, you will receive your host how-to guide with all of the information you’ll need, a detailed host checklist, and print outs for your guests.

One more note: if you live in a blue state with Democrat Senators, it still matters to educate voters and call your Senators. Behind the scenes, there are apparently more Democrats that oppose changing or getting rid of the filibuster, but they are scared to come out publicly, leaving Sens. Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to be the public face of Democrat opposition. Additionally, Democrat Sen. Dianne Feinstein (CA) is another example of a Democrat who opposes getting rid of the filibuster, but who the left has been bullying, pressuring her so much that she is beginning to change her mind. It may feel like a lost cause, and sometimes it is with Democrats, but this time it is not. We need to show the Democrats that Americans do not want to get rid of the filibuster, and give back up to the Democrats who agree with us.
|
---
Last week, Joe Biden announced that he was officially moving forward on what we've been warning that he would eventually do, if elected, since the Democratic Presidential Primary.

Joe Biden officially ordered a study on the “pros and cons” of packing the Supreme Court and other possible changes. This officially marks Biden's first step toward packing the court.

He moved forward in creating this commission, despite having previously described court packing as a “power grab” (2005) and “a boneheaded idea when FDR tried it” (1983). But, we know why...

Joe Biden is nothing more than an obedient puppet of the radical-Left. Remember, during the Presidential debates [then-President Trump tried to warn us this would happen](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMzc1NTE5Njk4NTgyOTAwNzM3P3M9MjAmbWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=qW-omBklPt16b3lxO5l7iw).
|
---
Check out The Red, White, & Blueprint
Some of our local coordinators in California told us about a massive effort to take on the oppressive tyrants at their county level. Not only are they doing this, but they are documenting the whole effort in a documentary series that you can watch for free. Their message for the rest of us, particularly those of us that live in areas where the local government behaves as tyrannically as the Biden administration, is that we can and should fight locally, and they have a blueprint that others can follow. **Go to[theredwhiteandblueprint.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9nby50aGVyZWR3aGl0ZWFuZGJsdWVwcmludC5jb20vYj9taWQ9NDM2MjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=4pPx_Wr-Yt9VI7prC4i8WA), watch the trailer, and sign up to watch the first episode for free.**
|
---
Joe Biden had a jammed-packed week, last week, of attacking fundamental American institutions with executive overreach. On top of creating a commission to push Democrats’ radical plan to pack the Supreme Court, he also took sweeping executive action to push gun control.

Which is ironic, seeing as how his son Hunter Biden was recently exposed for having lied on a federal background check to illegally purchase a firearm.

Perhaps Joe Biden’s new ATF nominee David Chipman, who Tucker Carlson described as a “conspiracy nut,” will arrest Hunter...

I mean, Chipman does in-fact believe that people who lie on background checks should be arrested, so if confirmed, would he pursue charges against the President’s son?

Only time will tell; but in the meantime, Joe Biden will continue to try to erode our civil liberties through executive action, all the while ensuring the rules don’t apply to his family or powerful friends.

The swamp is back.
|
---
Freeroots Campaigns – fast, easy activism!
Freeroots is an online activism portal, created by one of our allies, that allows you to take action in about thirty seconds. It is so, so easy and fast! Visit the following campaigns and share them online!

* **[Save the filibuster](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL2ZpZ2h0LTQtZmlsaWJ1c3Rlcj9taWQ9NDM2MjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=tfGb7nte-Yg6_gT8ysZxTA)**
* **[Go Woke, Go Broke!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL2dvd29rZS1nb2Jyb2tlP21pZD00MzYyOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=3zp9_hUD-sQjXlqrXtWucw)[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3Byb3RlY3QtZmFpci1lbGVjdGlvbnMtaW4tZ2VvcmdpYT9taWQ9NDM2MjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=H5KNxhw1mY5y_ulqLOsMYQ)**
* **[Stay Out of Politics, Facebook and Twitter!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3N0YXlvdXRvZnBvbGl0aWNzLWZiLXR3P21pZD00MzYyOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KCJHRqf-qDgfnYEvGz9Otw)**
* **[Tell Amazon to STOP Funding Black Lives Matter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3RlbGwtYW1hem9uLXRvLXN0b3AtZnVuZGluZy1ibGFjay1saXZlcy1tYXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=PCIf0wjpRAk-r1VRPtCNUw)**

|
---
The only seemingly good news to come out of last week is that Democrats won’t be able to ram their radical legislative agenda through Congress. Activism worked.

After receiving immense pressure from the right, Moderate Democrat Joe Manchin crushed Democrats’ dreams for “progressive” “transformational” change in one move, when he wrote an op-ed titled:

**[“I will not vote to eliminate or weaken the filibuster...”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL29waW5pb25zL2pvZS1tYW5jaGluLWZpbGlidXN0ZXItdm90ZS8yMDIxLzA0LzA3L2NkYmQ1M2M2LTk3ZGEtMTFlYi1hNmQwLTEzZDIwN2FhZGI3OF9zdG9yeS5odG1sP21pZD00MzYyOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=y9VvbOPfWmlzPluQUCcAuA)**

Eliminating the filibuster was key for radical progressives to even have a prayer’s chance of passing their radical agenda. Now, those dreams have been killed and, to that, we say good.

We must keep the pressure up; while we may not have the majority in Congress currently, a loud minority can keep the radicals relatively in check. Our activism paid off and we thank you for your help in this vital fight.
|
---
**Ongoing Action Items**
**[Sign up for the Election Integrity working group.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZzRMNTVhYnFwZ3FVSDhQRzg_bWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=HsA2ID2B_YuWiiwxLKn8ew)**

**[Sign up for the Immigration working group.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvMkg5TGh1c2dNNWRHOXhZcjY_bWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=y9dK_5utAapZXYhBZ5fkIA)**

The House press gallery is trying to block _The Epoch Times_ from renewing their press pass. **[Please sign our petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9lcG9jaHRpbWVzLmFjdC50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=zH_FxWil1hd7JOsQNxo_RQ) calling on the press gallery to reinstate their press pass!**

**Go to our website and[sign onto the letter opposing earmarks](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTAyLWUzYjA5NDM4ODFlNzQxZDY5NTJkYjU2MDBjNzY2ODA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC10aGUtY3VycmVuY3ktb2YtY29ycnVwdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQzNjI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=o8LgkZJs96DPFhRr1UqEYw).** Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email.
|

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Say NO to Biden's Gun Control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
Get your 2nd Amendment bumper stickers now! | |
---
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88cf7eaba85f43a899ebd6bc7baaf7e8&_e=8xCVYxCltUslhIbn8C5f3zoNLRKUiCkXQ67__O_yM2c2l8GANEOXq8Sl6nNpvAaEqV8XZyK82EiO-XYxN0woQqryA9tpd9OtejpexbA-Gn1gtumSUW3EzrEvMmIgBoF-drLd_IP2kMs572IUpKd606vlKnAg88ycQikPwhqlxjqp0KrWmwiyVT-VSnvxCy0ktQVSSxJQPXpK67RxGGk4EmapXy6s5TxOQCb-wIvHTHA9VpKva2rWgtJ72OomuhCxLLhLWpA7qL9eKvtVTrw3iOt9SZPrXKgo6NmM2uyd1FM%3D)
|
---
**Tell Biden: NO to Gun Control**
Dear Friend,
**Breaking News:** Biden signed 6 executive orders last week that all have one thing in common: They limit our Second Amendment rights.

Not only is Biden infringing on our constitutional rights, he’s not even bothering to send a bill to Congress. He’s just doing it unilaterally.

The end result: The new restrictions will make it harder for people to defend themselves and their families.

And if Biden gets away with this, who knows which constitutional rights he will target next?

**That’s why we need to take a stand and send a message that we will not tolerate Biden’s gun grab.**

clean_body: The Democrats raised a record amount of cash last month. ** . == Friend, The Democrats raised a record amount of cash last month. You read that right -- the Democrats are raising money like we 've never seen before. Needless to say, this is pretty serious. With their endless supply of cash, it is that much easier for Pelosi and her allies to expand their socialist agenda and silence conservative voices in toss-up districts like Michelle Steel. In fact, the Pelosi-backed candidate that Michelle beat in 2020 has already vowed for a rematch. That's why we're calling on all conservatives around the country: == | == == == Your support is critical to stopping Pelosi's agenda and getting America back on track. Without your support today, the Far Left has a free pass to raise taxes, keep small businesses closed, and enact their failed socialist agenda around the country. We are desperate for your help, Friend -- if not, who knows what Pelosi will plot next?** == Thank you, California Republican News Alerts With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Bill Olson
subject: I'll stand for religious liberty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a Swing district](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

_The First Amendment to the Constitution guarantees Free Exercise of Religion; this not only means freedom to worship as you please without government interference, but it means freedom of conscience._

Democrats forget that a lot these days.

The Governors of New York, New Jersey, California, and several other leftist states have spent the whole COVID emergency trying to attack the freedom of religion of Christians in America.

It makes me sick. These people don't want to recognize our Constitutionally guaranteed freedoms!

Luckily, Trump's appointees on the Supreme Court are standing strong for religious freedom:

_The U.S. Supreme Court in a divided decision late Friday ruled in favor of lifting restrictions on in-home religious gatherings, overturning a lower court ruling that upheld Gov. Gavin Newsom’s limits on people from different homes._

_The 5-4 unsigned ruling follows other similar decisions recently regarding churches and the coronavirus pandemic. The decision noted it was the fifth time the court has rejected the Ninth Circuit’s analysis of California coronavirus restrictions._

_The ruling stated that**before it can limit religious gatherings, the government must prove they pose a greater danger than secular activities** that remain open, such as shopping or attending movies._

While it's good that we have friends on the Supreme Court, we need more to protect our religious liberty. We need a Federal government that is not openly hostile to Christians!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=e3dHWOmnVgZLqKEPnsqiJA)
---

The crazy Democrats in Congress passed an act mandating the chemical castration of children as young as four years old, if they demand it, over their parents' objections. _This is crazy stuff, but they are hell bent on weaponizing the Federal government against its own Christian citizens._

**This has to be the end. Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and freedom of religion, they can never be trusted with the majority in Congress again.**

_I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. With a little more help, we can do this!_

Darren Soto voted for all of the bad Pelosi-Schumer legislation, including the anti-Christian bills that violate the Constitution. He's gone off the deep end, and I can beat him!

**I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution, every time. I spent my life defending it, and I will do so in Congress!**

If you value religious freedom, I need your help. Can[ you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2900 per individual, $5800 per couple?

**All the crazy extremist bills show us what is needed- we need control of Congress. I can help deliver that **- [with your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g)

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=glB5ANLelb8vIic&b=UYDF8ZBiPTYkZawTI6Nf2g)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rJxM7KwsTLTsLGxMTBzMnLRGtCyczJxM7Ezs) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rJxM7KwsTLTsLGxMTBzMnLRGtCyczJxM7Ezs)

Friend,
Proper leadership is absent in Sacramento. Governor Newsom has left California in shambles with his failed policies in addressing the pandemic. Middle class families are struggling, and they are not receiving the help they desperately need. **Since the pandemic began, thousands of small businesses have been shut down, which means unemployment has risen to alarming levels.**
_We are fed up. Aren 't you? _
We wanted to ask grassroots conservatives to help us send a message to Gov. Newsom that enough is enough. Will you help us do that answering our poll? Grade Gavin's performance as governor. "A" being okay and "F-" being terrible.

name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Reject HR1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
The Democrats' plan to end our First in the Nation Primary must be stopped!
[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fdefendfitn.com/1/01000178c6d6d6b5-4db13816-85c8-4be6-8134-13f16aef67d7-000000/6nQ0Rkmw7kuFSuEgi17RhyuvN3c=209)

Derek,

By now, I’m sure that many of you are aware of the Democrats’ bill HR1, a push towards a total overhaul of our voting system, and not for the better. HR1 is a threat, not only to our First in the Nation Primary, but to the integrity of our elections, and ultimately to the rights of the states to govern themselves. Make no mistake, this is legislation which will have far-reaching consequences, beyond this upcoming election.

What the Democrats are deceptively calling the “For the People Act,” is, in reality, a transgression against Granite Staters. Federalized elections, taxpayer funded campaigns, a ban on voter ID, attacks on election integrity, these things are only the tip of the iceberg. HR1 would implement numerous measures which have already been rejected by the New Hampshire legislature, including a mandated 15 days of early voting, universal no-excuse absentee voting, and automatic voter registration. These ultimatums do nothing to ensure free and fair elections, but open the door to fraud, and set a precedent of Federal overreach. Democrats, both nationally and locally, have no interest in election integrity, only in maintaining and abusing their own authority.

Both of our Representatives, Chris Pappas and Ann Kuster have already voted in favor of HR1, while Senators Jeane Shaheen and Maggie Hassan have signaled their support. In doing so, our representatives have not only taken a stand against New Hampshire law, but also taken the first steps toward ending one of our most significant traditions, our First in the Nation Primary.

Since 1920 the Granite State has proudly served as the first state in the nation to hold its presidential primary election. Though Republicans and Democrats alike have historically defended our First in the Nation status, it now appears that the Democrats are ready to abandon this tradition. Our Secretary of State Bill Gardner has called HR1 “an egregious overreach of federal authority,” and says it will “put our Presidential Primary in a perilous position. Meanwhile national democrats like Harry Reid and James Clyburn have already made clear their intent to find a new home for the nation’s inaugural primary. In abandoning First in the Nation, New Hampshire Democrats have shown their loyalty, not to their constituents, but to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their Democrat cronies in DC.

It is vital that we take action, and defend New Hampshire’s first in the nation primary before it is too late. Please, take this opportunity to sign our petition, defend New Hampshire traditions, and call on our Federal Legislators to REJECT HR1. The New Hampshire GOP is holding our Federal Delegation’s feet to the fire with our latest TV and Digital Ad - please help us extend our TV and Digital Advertisement with a contribution today. By supporting our efforts, you ensure that our message reaches more eyes, and sends a clear message to Maggie Hassan and Jeanne Shaheen that New Hampshire stands against HR1.

[Sign the Petition to Defend FITN!](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn/1/01000178c6d6d6b5-4db13816-85c8-4be6-8134-13f16aef67d7-000000/rW7YVyt7YPdreapC5GXwPpG8GNE=209)

\- Chairman, Stephen Stepanek

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee

[secure.nh.gop](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fsecure.nh.gop/1/01000178c6d6d6b5-4db13816-85c8-4be6-8134-13f16aef67d7-000000/0C_nmfATQdEz0hGStZwppzUbsDY=209) | [unsubscribe](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.nh.gop%2Funsubscribe/1/01000178c6d6d6b5-4db13816-85c8-4be6-8134-13f16aef67d7-000000/mXtYc7klJUp3HzzdQrFhjHokmEs=209)

body:
Friend, The fight to take back our country starts with taking back Virginia this year, but we need the right leaders in place to help lead the charge. **One of those leaders that we desperately need down in Richmond is Phillip Scott.** [>>> Click here to donate to Phillip's campaign now <<<](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=d422b60626784199981992f095f26f4d&_e=AWLOSU70VkmXZ-NZrReuj_HRd4BaqBfqxDMENMB12jAKSKOilI--L5335yN6FdjH3mGMCeqReHwvAV84slcM2AcA87xxga0DNwgS_8tDfQQBrFN1x5FSSMZqr-6mLYc20tixuWzXtQWjYPx66P4MUJ45WTndQs6UOJytuwDfnbf1YpWosY6HvH569J8pNpscKSuX4K8sayQRb27vqNrtvjD2OhLb6_UyFxouhEX3IYW9EPj-wXiQ9aKS-0qPQlFlgQ5fGJbCWvm8bngMKMiaE17n__QrriUh1nr-j3UTgYo%3D) **Phillip is a fearless conservative fighter that will join me in Richmond to fight against the dangerous and radical agenda that the progressive left has been enacting over the last several years.** It is no exaggeration to say that our liberties are under attack in Virginia right now. With total control over our state government, the Democrats have passed tax increases, pushed to erode our Second Amendment rights, and overseen a dramatic increase in the size and scope of government. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: my father passed away last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter --

My father passed away last night after a hard
fought battle over the past 3 months with Melanoma.

Most people don't know how tremendously
difficult my first three months of Congress have been.
While I have endured the flaming arrows fired
daily at me while I have been fighting against the left's war on
our freedoms in Congress, my soul was torn apart watching my
Daddy suffer and slowly die with cancer.
We don't win every battle we fight, but my
amazing father won the war, and he taught me how to withstand the
greatest enemy.
My Dad was the forgotten American man that
President Trump worked so hard for.
My Dad grew up with very little, but with a
faith in God and dreamed the Great American Dream.
He worked every job from riding a bike
delivering newspapers, to factory work, to construction work, and
all in between, while trying to go to school.
He was drafted at age 20 to go to war in
Vietnam and served our country in the Navy. He lost friends just
like many did.
He met a girl after his service, when he went
back to college, married my Mom, and had a little girl named
Marjorie.
He couldn't finish school, but proudly went
to work to support his family.
With only a truck and a ladder, he tirelessly
worked and eventually built a thriving construction company that
put a roof over our heads, fed us, clothed us, and Dad provided
our families every need.
My Dad had the strongest hands I've ever
known.

They held me as a baby, carried me, swung me,
threw me in the air, lifted me to ride on his shoulders. . .
They taught me to tie my shoes, ride a bike,
throw, catch, and hit a ball, and fish. . .
They taught me how to drive a car, drive a
boat, and sail a sailboat. . .
I watched his hands build amazing things with
his tools. . .
Measure, snap a chalk line, cut, hammer all
the nails in with one swing, climb the ladders, load the trucks.
. .
I watched his hands write, calculate, and
carefully bid projects on all the many blueprints. . .
They typed, wrote, and published books. . .
They created inventions that even got
nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize. . .
They took care of my mother and held her
tight and loved her so. . .
But the greatest thing my father's hands ever
did was they taught me how to pray. . .
My Dad's big strong hands put my tiny hands
together when I was young and introduced me to God. . .
Last night, the Mighty Hands that formed and
created my Dad's hands, and the wonderful man that my father is,
lifted him up and took him home to heaven.
Today we rejoice that his pain is gone and he
has been set free!
Thank you all of you who support me.
Soon I will be back.

And this time, I'll be all in because my
heart is no longer broken now that my Daddy has been set free.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

You've likely heard about the recent voting bill passed in Georgia. It was passed to heal the wounds of the 2020 election and make sure future elections are secure.
Everyone is talking about it, which is why Team Cammack wants to know: [do you support Georgia's voting law?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cnjfZR1nJWM-38PdLC8dk2RlcESXhO1jfEDjdJ5qC1ABI-sN3NSY_wmZsbBKzQKziXSNa5qgT2uXrm1Hig1nAIC0SmKgp21voF4xkqo0r0M4Ug-4mgyBpi6SWAv3pPAK9VIrbEonO0m3-21WrZS_PJ7Lmdz4iy3YsgVi1w9EAbCQYHnElU93iXAW-v2MrWZg&c=RsmO_p95HfkeYMMamAJ9rq0gK_wMF2x1iSLLKgTpaEZHRhgfQKGqQw==&ch=nxTrwmbsxOjwlmRa-LOum589DHCOkGwxWC3YTaC72sjzBFBPCQJ3Gw==&jrc=1)

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Covid Provides a Rare Chance to Transform Public Education
body:
In post-Katrina New Orleans, Louisiana built a system that serves the needs of students, not adults. [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=39dd481454b94edc879ae154833d7b4a&_e=2GlusUsiH06S-okIG0hMdUweCeCaI3BMRlwHKxw0WiSU1B0nwcRyEFQAnTZXLSpKp6MaXOEIi-n_P6-l-fz57gThFiNJ3k1n3U8BzgtcZr_ra8CbwjJiHfJvplVk5uFh_MNmGIWNMdnSfX3V1IstqmPUAEYJVRvDJT_tATOeVQ3z3WPT9X0QWuM9sT6b0rf0LycUipY6M--3YVoFtLsitQLHf7__Cluy4cCbeaUR14hySOacWW-Es1jRy3NjYOMEXbhiJdeQKZ95vFQ_1th3XQ%3D%3D) | |
---
**Covid Provides a Rare Chance to Transform Public Education**

_In post-Katrina New Orleans, Louisiana built a system that serves the needs of students, not adults._

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
The Covid-19 pandemic has brought into focus a stark choice: Will we respond to the enormous disruption of schools by rethinking education, or will we double down on an outdated industrial-age system created to prepare kids for the last century?

New Orleans faced a similar dilemma after Hurricane Katrina struck in August 2005. Louisiana’s Legislature had in 2003 created a Recovery School District to turn around failing schools, but the storm’s devastation accelerated the process. The RSD was responsible for dozens of schools, which became charter schools. Students were freed from traditional attendance zones and allowed to pick their schools. Thousands of teachers were asked to reapply for their positions.

Louisiana in subsequent years allowed funding to follow the student, but the most effective way to improve student performance, which correlates with higher lifetime earnings and better socioeconomic outcomes, is great teaching. Louisiana reformed its teacher compensation and tenure laws, tying them to student outcomes as part of an effort to reward great teachers.

New Orleans recently became the first major city where all public-school students attend charter schools. Graduation and retention rates and student test scores increased; 62% of students attended the state’s lowest-performing schools (F-grade) in 2004-05, but that share fell to 8% by 2018. To help disadvantaged students narrow the achievement gap, some New Orleans schools adopted a competency-based approach to learning as opposed to one based on seat time. Others formed partnerships with Teach for America and hired teachers with nontraditional backgrounds. Some schools offered specialized curricula focusing on math and science...

_Read the full article[**HERE**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=39dd481454b94edc879ae154833d7b4a&_e=2GlusUsiH06S-okIG0hMdYQkXH3NDcA7xTSkcPkqbBUIvmWubPdL11j_h-UsnTrDPs1-yLwdF3FFyfEBrrb5MGA22CuVh9j5VpxshSVKtRhQz-7TdZp3aTu8C4YrQQqncXYSu-6IJfNm3LRIm4kMaP9BQ5Q83w5QAVX2Ktm9wQ7xtYuotXHaE7rmNuMx4nJmdmvgovc83Kq5MY583mcTBofH4CFlsAEyhBjIkjej6j24_DmcYR5wgnwLC3zXdr0VwY0Wq-0lZ41vj1sZvmqoCH_hiqMFQ5IW-LXzRTWhE_AEAoKELXvA3LboJBFW7eqdCEkQgKuv3dvWg2mwHG9e4YkcRBmNAw4Pc2iNpy99m3DV7P5OzE_KOtE1dkjyZO70)._

|

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I hope you'll read this, please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
I'm writing to thank you for getting involved with my campaign to protect New Hampshire's vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats' majority. I'm also writing, however, because our online fundraising program is pacing a bit behind this month.
I know that these emails can be overwhelming, especially when times are hard. But I hope you'll take a minute to read this message about why this race matters. [**Then, I hope you 'll please make a donation to stop Republicans from flipping this seat -- and the majority. Even $3 would go a long way.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8e7/2a380d31/26982b13/f077f7/556452799/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQxMl9td2hfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210412_mwh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
I first got involved in public service to ensure that all Americans have the opportunity to succeed. I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could. Serving Granite Staters as State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator has been the honor of my life.
In 2016, I defeated the incumbent Republican Senator by only 1,017 votes. Now, the GOP has made me their top target in 2022. Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and pundits say that New Hampshire is the most likely state to flip.
With your help, we flipped the Senate -- making it possible to pass historic COVID-19 relief, help struggling families and small businesses, and expand access to health care. But if Republicans take control again, they could erase all our progress.
That's why our race in New Hampshire is so important. With so much on the line, I'm truly grateful to have you by my side.
I hope you can get involved, stay engaged, and be a part of this campaign. [**If you would like to make a real impact (and I sincerely hope you do), please rush $3 or more right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8e7/2a380d31/26982b13/f077f7/556452799/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQxMl9td2hfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210412_mwh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8e7/2a380d31/26982b13/f077f7/556452799/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQxMl9td2hfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210412_mwh_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

clean_body: Hi there -- I'm writing to thank you for getting involved with my campaign to protect New Hampshire's vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats' majority. I'm also writing, however, because our online fundraising program is pacing a bit behind this month. I know that these emails can be overwhelming, especially when times are hard. But I hope you'll take a minute to read this message about why this race matters. "" I first got involved in public service to ensure that all Americans have the opportunity to succeed. I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could. Serving Granite Staters as State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator has been the honor of my life. In 2016, I defeated the incumbent Republican Senator by only 1,017 votes. Now, the GOP has made me their top target in 2022. Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and pundits say that New Hampshire is the most likely state to flip. With your help, we flipped the Senate -- making it possible to pass historic COVID-19 relief, help struggling families and small businesses, and expand access to health care. But if Republicans take control again, they could erase all our progress. That's why our race in New Hampshire is so important. With so much on the line, I'm truly grateful to have you by my side. I hope you can get involved, stay engaged, and be a part of this campaign. "" Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan "" _

body:
Sign my petition today if you want to protect your vote. Pelosi's latest power grab would disenfranchise law-abiding Republican voters. Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections.

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni2jDHFLRRHaXeR-MmZpLrsNO91Y-m0BbnqnyGevEwka8TgrVi4LAUVn2AyVfk7fTVi-GwkiF36Z1God-Lv52VPsUAbfgNNXWXk9JkloPEf0wo4NQwuPP2p-EfeuxBGYSioErLP-f1_Ug81Y5JTul_iiQGoRTbq0_Nf6AynkE0c1pb1YfabSZ3C2gfZ02k9AbS7Y8ebTjXeHYnpcTtWzFDBL)

**ELECTION INTEGRITY PLEDGE** : Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. **We can put an end to these attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority **.

**[We're looking for 1,000 conservatives to sign our Election Integrity Pledge today. Please add your signature before midnight.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni1zQ4mzKVKzhULcISEBCa7SZTH0ao8mBI4VU79lfNXFWFmJPfykBxnaQnN5VYDi5tYkJ0GmEN6ZD6S_TgbLo2U9MRjEryHVcnYHvJTUkIYwTt3Or9RRpqDLa0TsIPs0hR-nTf7t8N-dsFqAPwIhn8-UMPZ7MVbIHUY0HG20iMHZ4eekShzjUqbNOyRaNpG4ajjJmqInhJhaPTxXsDijPh3A) **

| [**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni0wrnmhrbc7vSPjAnZn6CrLrZ52A1O5djvLfJ9S8Lm9KWbcelO_On5Cwnb865P70OtLxDfadz7x4MVeoF2OFVu3RTChZJEOl3UsVWYWemcOp18eI5kKFXoSH48syFu2VDYcCmfhFeNRX-Dos4deT3oz6kzDzy9ypDEvULn8UP98cXGhXrB85rKOiQu2IgIGqWyh40wpRGbhiNiNFxZTjV7t)
---

Fellow American,

What a month March was for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – **in the middle of the night** – without a single Republican vote.

Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable **Democrats** to cement a **permanent Congressional majority**.

How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including,
1. Allowing government agencies to _**ignore immigration status**_ when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and,
2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem!

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni2DkOMxalxqTYg5e0QA9sRuburUM1ssgR87Elmj4gnj1dwSi01-Q2ZiZQkO5Hjj6YESGdLKOZ3zV5tJVG5Fpn1MmT6AZ4XZ2u6Rmokc-9w4O6k3JBUJyl-S0NjEbjyt8roEJJydO50uYTAgeIoJfAXjVJNfcFRX7FXaEeSP947uCKQxOyp7nvGAPQR-3RS0N1H5062U8N7YMCAOqhzUTR-G)
---

While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1:
1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns – up to $5 MILLION dollars.
2. Congress will be committed to delivering “full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) – bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own.

**We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni0sptEbv6Sh3U4tWZTep2XdCt8-YsOuC4qPb8QnL3RCSi6PeYiH7gZx9B9W6Tt5bc1u2r_UnHVE9FLCCx3H4xAy97IfvFVLiaA70cZhGZubjuArj463TSpJ4EdcVTed2RzBPtgnGxmbdinQ6ATtaSGiQbaF-_BydAWWIxRv9wdbeSLNdlWXEY2-8wfbdPgicrWHQYSVdaaPPxslIN-H0o-c)
---

I have to be honest with you, Fellow American, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections _forever_.

It’s our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi’s blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. **[If we don’t act now, soon it may be too late.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni3Z6ErZ4h_iDKSLHm2ynhNCiD3B7GMcRCLYd4TPpG1VKweK8za4WutsYEFWMlfA2lB9Ivz8Pp80GwLeSaCmztSSilv4Mwh_B0lSM8TWHhzXCxohNCENdUtlvwvYM5YnnF-ToQW6bC2vHC8jzYSkcvCh7Cr5t9oDZjeqJF7cfR7cvuk4KdoPbG6QglLn_iA-b3dEO6wI7yilHKBJZrtIOPmM)**

Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together – like Ohio and Florida – **they’re going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois**.

Consider that for 97 days, New York’s 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic.

Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, **it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes**.

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni1vmtBzhlBVobyQHpnBH3XQ5JGs347QshRU5kp5V3RnsjsGckeg2yZ1JFE8CLxFsSMXPnbBZoiuLslTJhWeXYG2MJqumj4zZXCS3Vvfe08jZkFbFQ9hLyTVaNe8X9tsalXRUIRPEAjYoVY7EvUmiQ9gKbxGmKwpT5kqgDVN9XSaiSq0Ya_lFCLgFkP75urCKtRmT61FzKxmHLR0FCcgSDjh)
---

**On a final note:** With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud!

In the name of liberty, **[please sign our petition today denouncing H.R. 1.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni3WLcCbwqS3IzS3wdH8Za3hYP1Of1JtrbuDGzx38wb_kxumTp3txwppoOr9pRljkW_wwnEOYSs7sU19xCBARJOMX30rimsxB2GAjw9X4FQ1A6r_AuOkHjAdSFJuQgy_sN5m962QW27f3BvDfr4jLL5SMBedNJTbhjpolqe0a0lCTHYkEj3wvHs2MrBV32MPw9aCmVxAx2iLymXRRO7qO-oz)**

We must act before it’s too late.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e92802a4e76a4ae8b111eff569f4e16d&_e=cwurfP4oMp9048pViSZ9qTl6GxGh6xOBriQdElnN-JqSnRCLKTSYVHQl4FeLNhJfEtYLRCxGLGmZCeZD9U90f3d24T2II1T5OdEQ5tm3OgKvic7rZAfQmbArmkzPRDlUXsGvTu09rxWMX437QH_48IArYBnElmF6Rng-mVyQSpRYUo7S7yLudJMUjg0vNtijO8XohThbwoF-TVE0Vz6DFBTD2Ll5h8p1XsBgAMZU0GnHzLycbDJNr0qEvlqSDvglEduj_alfkD1zH08Zmu2f9JLiPar6gSmZndxlde82Ni0WHo6nsHiObjPgbFUpfedxmTuAcYRfowpNocOHjl1WCl_Jjk5UT5YRBXnRX5YhQ0hZsNjJGZoHDKdtmqBhX7sbKJBIdfFM5tbV8OwQKKwBEgzKwNu2ldVs6uMQXwrdqfNhSYoX0Z5V4gDKwDNsVr3yK-q8dWIVslXpFLB8aepD2Xs4tiiKw3vhHmbmIs7SpKAZTxnFUTrEAeu-uDsod2x6)

_This just in: Tiffany Shedd is running for Attorney General_ It’s official, friend. _**I’m running for Attorney General to protect Arizona.**_ Over the years, I’ve stood up to bullies because if you are not saying no to something, you are saying yes. It’s clear that Arizonans need a fighter to stop those who would destroy our country. **There is no room in Arizona for dangerous policies like defunding the police, open borders, and radical gun control.** As the Chief Law Enforcement Officer in Arizona, **I will stand up for Arizonans** and STOP these policies. Do I have your support? Please take a moment to sign our petition? It is crucial to make sure my name is on the ballot. Will you add your name? _Links below direct you to the Arizona Secretary of State’s website which requires identifying information. That information is not shared with us._ [**Sign Tiffany’s Petition**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=62c74d00de124054ae63dd2a5610608c&_e=-QiO7Y-6TSqnTAFwZO3Fj2k8UajWmG0dwarzjeU6E7Hk1PqWIaivE_Dhf8KilwUEripDde6VDYgi9jqQ0tfutqjb-3TqaqMLKzQEmbJCNpdHLpFWyjmptaE-FIu5UiVUmsA1upn2HTQRXSmuVfIR0S82oEcS6p9ihLPAp9jjRvvFnsGhxGB8RK-AW0VrAuKkHqVPs-RqOno_MLe23AMVf9MN8o2A2ssidOo9TSIHUFh6eLGcM9tH-le8Xug4l7am_Ydc5ApD_bhwDyHTspJ2fbuR8UPcpHpeRpZuF8Mo3eA%3D) You can visit the Arizona Secretary of State’s website and add your name by clicking __**[here](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=62c74d00de124054ae63dd2a5610608c&_e=-QiO7Y-6TSqnTAFwZO3Fj2k8UajWmG0dwarzjeU6E7Hk1PqWIaivE_Dhf8KilwUEripDde6VDYgi9jqQ0tfutgIiNci_hbJqZ4PTBfY-hMgTvq9Kcs3FDiYgpMr6jxUaeYcingUjdJgSUnVOf8r4MN_qfxfAX0pJPD1U-tdkid1tXQRIUmoXwRRZ1Q4dqvRvEhTT6LY9cO4lVtomL9IC49_NiBffAwOJQFOjuEGmKygYN2FnXlbACu2x-N2JbjygxDSIcufMh6dhXk_qsnYduLUttVpP8K4Jhvd4rgXHaxM%3D)**__. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Pelosi/Schiff Argue Congress Can Secretly Subpoena Phone Records of Citizens
body:
Congressman Schiff secretly subpoenaed the phone records of a number of private citizens from telephone companies. He did not provide notice to these individuals in advance that their phone records were being sought. He did not subpoena the phone records directly from the citizens. Instead, he subpoenaed the phone companies for the records, preventing any opportunity for the private citizens to seek court review, as would happen in any other case in where the government is seeking this kind of information about any citizen.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 12, 2021

clean_body: Congressman Schiff secretly subpoenaed the phone records of a number of private citizens from telephone companies. He did not provide notice to these individuals in advance that their phone records were being sought. He did not subpoena the phone records directly from the citizens. Instead, he subpoenaed the phone companies for the records, preventing any opportunity for the private citizens to seek court review, as would happen in any other case in where the government is seeking this kind of information about any citizen. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 12, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Congressman Schiff secretly subpoenaed the phone records of a number of private citizens from telephone companies. He did not provide notice to these individuals in advance that their phone records were being sought. He did not subpoena the phone records directly from the citizens. Instead, he subpoenaed the phone companies for the records, preventing any opportunity for the private citizens to seek court review, as would happen in any other case in where the government is seeking this kind of information about any citizen. ---|--- | | | | == | == The assault on election integrity is certainly nothing new, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton noted Friday. This time, the Left is attacking the Georgia legislature’s “modest reforms on election security,” which include “expanding voting hours on weekends,” “codifying the ability to get an absentee ballot,” and the requirement that voters provide “an ID number ... on the documents relating to absentee balloting.” == ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch JW President Tom Fitton: “It’s pretty clear [John] Brennan was one of the key guys pushing this fraudulent dossier. I don’t trust anything those agencies have said about the Russiagate scandal.” == Judicial Watch A panel of experts probed the targeting of President Trump through the illicit use of the spy agencies. With the collapse of the Mueller investigation, President Trump has been exonerated of the false accusations of collusion and obstruction with the Russians, the panel turned its attention to the politicization of Department of Justice and the intelligence community. One of the panelists was Carter Page, former Trump campaign advisor and one of the targets of Deep State. == == Washington Examiner Former President Trump’s spy chief claims law enforcement knows the laptop purportedly belonging to Hunter Biden is indeed his, blasting the former intelligence officials who suggested the laptop story was a Russian disinformation operation. During a presidential debate, Joe Biden dismissed the laptop emails as part of a “Russian plan,” saying, "there are 50 former national intelligence folks who said that what [Trump's] accusing me of is a Russian plan.” == == == = = = = | CLIPS | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

body:
The days of giant corporations and Silicon Valley oligarchs running this country are numbered. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=14b41e939ce540dbb962e157242b1ad8&_e=z2yfPtPZE_cn1CHI2R8zfr4objjMhB95mQwQdv5x9wG7CLA0TMMAJkXqaXymUUbxSXjL9_dfnncvKcMBgfJIBcllXmOg2IGrPnNWFokvAi7fk2DOavZ9i8qqsVVcPnPUjplBe8wh87nPbfPL2vx0fFy0WqGb1OqZit34PveyqW4NMSGU3mO4i0evtc6pTPsMGjI3KJk4hlOU5dHFhVI8REMBin8xH3SbD8VJANUD0hKpdd4Ftri1qgmqSeOEOxgS0msVtGTmB-ucInQ8EDUL3kf4wwpAq6Mv7GsHDGxXCvCtDAuuBQ65o4gtmM-ZX-0i1I2OFKKOEATDvhg8Czyd4UyaBNKuvszMW3Xk2EDJdfj-I0HytRQ928rkcvUMhgoyow_s54GYOC09jw9c7IoP_g%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
You’ve seen the news — at every corner of our country, enormous corporations push the woke religion and peddle Joe Biden’s pathetic lies about Georgia’s election integrity laws.

We’ve seen these bloated corporations ship American jobs to China, some of the most hostile and inhumane working conditions imaginable, all while lecturing on human rights and social justice here in America.

The hypocrisy is nauseating, and something must be done!

**The days of giant corporations and Silicon Valley oligarchs running this country are numbered. **

We’ve seen how the Obama/Biden administration gave Google sweetheart deals by choosing not to regulate, and how Facebook and Twitter actively censor conservative viewpoints and cancel those they disagree with, **EVEN DONALD TRUMP.**

**We need a modern solution to deal with a problem that has plagued our country in the past, which is why I'm introducing a trust-busting agenda for the 21st century.**
[_**HELP FIGHT THE WOKE CORPORATIONS**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=14b41e939ce540dbb962e157242b1ad8&_e=z2yfPtPZE_cn1CHI2R8zfr4objjMhB95mQwQdv5x9wG7CLA0TMMAJkXqaXymUUbxVyNcqJscevqEm4AnX1bz7lNJ_u6vRWtoQnu9Sq7CB1Pfy9BK2m8tzifY95AEii3c3zNEfbFab8Og87wNtAX4oqQVOapeuZYXzhPbGC4-hai5AkeF0CLB1huljiUamuYkutiph2oVgrK0-mXCG8VyzXozi3Feyj1siY2IMAEggWSnLFKvcXLwlIXf67wXbNcXOBB-3PsUwX3f0Hb8xQT2ZW4xr9eFuby6viobECMVsf02c_zkU7rUqPxGJObA8QD0ssgMrCzP7D6MjW946YyvvIl2SdSsvWMxuHaNneycM2jAuFnBVImuSDLnUOz5qujRpsbxLdL3FYl1r_4-aNfNSA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Democrats Trying to Shut Down Action 4 Liberty
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **How do you know when you are having a HUGE impact? Your enemies come after you. And that's what is happening right now.** We told you a couple weeks ago that the Democrat Bosses used the official House Sgt-at-Arms to try to get us to take down our digital ads against Con Artists Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard. Of course, we told them to take a hike! Then we found out that [Julie Sandstede tried getting the FBI and BCA](https://www.action4liberty.com/delusional_democrats?utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&utm_medium=email&utm_source=action4liberty&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=2) to investigate us in this heightened political environment. But it didn't seem like that route worked for them either. It's kind of hard to get law enforcement involved against hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans who are expressing their protected right of free speech! Oh yeah, and breaking NO LAWS WHATSOEVER! **Especially when Democrats like Tim Walz continue throwing our law enforcement under the bus!** **** Now the Democrat Bosses are shamelessly using the Campaign Finance Board to come after us with insanely baseless claims. I told many of you that they also filed a ridiculous complaint against Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen. Here's what the complaint says: Action 4 Liberty describes itself as an organization with the mission “to protect liberty for the next generation” by “recruit[ing] pro-liberty candidates for the legislature and equip[ing] them to win their elections.” Its actions are overtly political and plainly intended to influence the nomination or election of candidates. The website describes the organization’s efforts to deploy a field team in the Hibbing area “to go door to door to tell every voter in Rep. Julie Sandstede’s district about how she betrayed them and voted to protect Governor Walz’ emergency powers. **It's crystal clear to me that we are having a HUGE impact. As the pressure grows on their most vulnerable members, they are trying to silence you and me to make it stop. They are trying to scare us away from doing what is desperately needed: ACCOUNTABILITY!** Action 4 Liberty exists to be YOUR voice at the Capitol, your ally in the political trenches around the state and your fighter wherever your freedoms are under attack. Are we going to sit back and let these politicians vote over and over again for Governor Walz' Emergency Powers that shut down our economy and locked people in their homes?
## HELL NO!
As long as Action 4 Liberty is around, politicians who continually work against your freedoms will be held accountable. We won't allow your speech to be silenced. It's your right that is protected by the First Amendment to our beautiful Constitution. So we will NOT BACK DOWN. We will continue taking our message directly to the voters and constituents of the politicians standing in the way of our freedoms. It's precisely this mentality that has been absent amongst the Republican ranks in this state too long. We are sick and tired of cowering to the radical left who are trying to run our lives. We REFUSE to quit and give up our Republic! I just got off the phone with our head of field operations and our strategy team. They said now is the time to DOUBLE DOWN. And I agree! **I'm happy to announce that some of Action 4 Liberty doorknockers are heading to Detroit Lakes/Moorhead RIGHT NOW. We will talk to every single voter in Con Artist Paul Marquart's district and let them know how he is voting to protect Walz' Emergency Powers.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=3)
## Equip Action 4 Liberty with the tools to fight back against these attacks on us and let's keep putting the pressure on these politicians!
[**Action 4 Liberty will NOT BACK DOWN. Please continue supporting the one organization willing to fight for your rights and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all!!!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=4) Do what the Democrat Bosses Hate the MOST: [**Support and Help Build**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&utm_medium=email&utm_source=action4liberty&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=5) Action 4 Liberty today! **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&n=8), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I was just at our southern border
body:
Biden's Border Crisis is out of control | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2d05698ebbb3/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

_**I just left the southern border. It is the definition of a crisis and it is a result of the Biden Administration’s reversal**_ of Trump-era border policies which dramatically drove down illegal entry and brought security to our southern border.

Biden’s undoing of Trump’s policies along with **Biden, Harris, and Pelosi’s open border rhetoric have created the highest number of illegal border entries in 15 years – 172,000 in March alone!**

We have seen the heart-wrenching images of children packed into plexiglass cells. _But this crisis is far from just children, the cartels are making millions a day getting paid to bring hardened criminals, sex traffickers and terrorists into our country. Yes, terrorists._

One border agent said to me “it’s only a matter of time that a terrorist act in our country happens from someone that came through the southern border.”

_**Local communities along the border are living in fear, dramatic spikes in violent crime and chaos are the norm – one town had 27 high speed chases in one week.**_

**_Local law enforcement and Border Patrol are working tirelessly to protect their communities but Biden’s reckless policies are making their jobs impossible._**

I will be honest, the situation at our southern border is bad, and Biden continues to ignore this crisis and refuses to even tour the southern border, it's shameful.

That's why I am emailing you - **you need to know what is actually going on, and we need to make our voices heard. We cannot let Biden hide on this one. Can I count on you to join me in this fight? **
